expected_detections.name: Sandbox Detection
expected_detections.description: Code attempts to detect sandbox/analysis environments and exits to evade detection
indicators: File count heuristics (sandboxes have few files)
Immediate exit when sandbox indicators found

expected_detections.name: Document Exfiltration
expected_detections.description: Underlying payload steals PDF, Word, and Excel documents
indicators: Glob pattern matching for document types
Reading files from Documents and Desktop

notes: Sandbox detection targets automated malware analysis systems. Real user environments have more files, longer uptime, and more activity.
